description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure dressed in a striking, urban-inspired outfit. The individual wears a wide-brimmed hat with attached goggles, a form-fitting long-sleeve shirt featuring a dynamic, lightning-like pattern, and loose jogger-style pants adorned with graphic designs. The arms are covered with metallic-looking bracers, and the hands are gloved, adding a futuristic or cyberpunk flair. The face is obscured by a dark mask or covering, giving the figure an enigmatic appearance. White sneakers complete the look, making the figure suitable for a modern city or street environment.
description: Urban adult pedestrian with a wide-brimmed hat, futuristic bracers, graphic joggers, and white sneakers, face obscured by a mask.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, including the hat with goggles, lightning-patterned shirt, bracers, joggers, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, the arm bracer, and the side graphics on the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the hat, the shirt's pattern, and the detailed graphics on the back of the joggers.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the arm bracer, side pant graphics, and the overall silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: wide-brimmed hat with goggles, long-sleeve fitted shirt, jogger-style pants, metallic bracers, gloves
